authorization_phrase_detected: YES produce P169 signal review and threshold sensitivity plan only, no rerun, no verdict change

p167_null_conclusion_preserved.statement: P167 final classification P167_POWER_LOTTO_NO_DEFENSIBLE_EDGE_FOUND is NOT changed by P169. OOS Window 2 (499 draws) does NOT retroactively pass the 500-draw minimum. No deployment evidence exists. P169 is a plan document only.

threshold_sensitivity_plan.objective: Evaluate whether the pre-declared 500-draw OOS window minimum is materially sensitive. Specifically: does the ensemble consensus voting result change direction or lose significance if the window minimum is set to 450, 475, 499, or 525 draws instead of 500?
threshold_sensitivity_plan.label_requirement: All results at thresholds other than 500 must be labeled RETROSPECTIVE_SENSITIVITY_ONLY — not as original gate passage, not as deployment evidence

allowed_scenarios.label: ORIGINAL_PROTOCOL — reference result from P167 (Window 2 INSUFFICIENT)
RETROSPECTIVE_SENSITIVITY_ONLY — applies to Window 1 only (500 draws < 525)

metrics_to_report_per_scenario: Number of OOS windows meeting the threshold
Mean hit count per OOS window
z-statistic and raw p-value per window
BH-corrected p across all windows in scenario
Stability: do all windows agree on direction?
forbidden_future_interpretations: Cannot rewrite P167 Module F final gate as PASSED
Cannot use sensitivity-only results as deployment evidence
Cannot reclassify P167 final classification based on sensitivity findings
Cannot claim 'would have passed' as equivalent to 'passed'
Cannot use sensitivity results to authorize controlled_apply or champion promotion
threshold_sensitivity_plan.interpretation_requirement: If the effect holds at 400-draw windows AND all scenarios show consistent positive direction, this is evidence that the signal is threshold-robust — not that the P167 Module F gate was satisfied. Future data collection (≥ 1 new draw completing Window 2 at the 500-draw threshold) remains the only path to formal Module F gate passage.
threshold_sensitivity_plan.data_source: Existing zen-gates canonical dataset (94924 rows, 1499 POWER_LOTTO complete draws) — READ ONLY. No new rows added.
threshold_sensitivity_plan.leakage_guard: All scenarios evaluate existing data only. No future data peeking. No parameter selection after seeing per-scenario results.
threshold_sensitivity_plan.pre_registration_required: All threshold scenarios must be declared in this P169 plan BEFORE P170 executes any analysis. P170 must not add new scenarios after seeing results.

signal_tracking_plan.objective: Pre-register a prospective tracking protocol for the two strongest signals from P167: (A) consensus voting ensemble (Module A) and (B) main-number signal (Module E). Evaluate these signals on future or genuinely held-out POWER_LOTTO draws.

target_signals.configuration: Equal-weight voting, bet_index=1 only, top-6 by vote count across all 10 strategies
target_signals.oos_window_1_reference: P167 OOS Window 1 (500 draws), mean=1.040, p_bh=0.049
target_signals.metric: Per-draw ensemble hit count (target: > 0.9749, best P161 single-strategy)
target_signals.baseline: Random 0.9474; best single strategy 0.9749 (fourier_rhythm_3bet from P161)

target_signals.configuration: Per-draw mean hit count across all 10 strategies, bet_index=1 only, main numbers only (not special)
target_signals.metric: Per-draw mean hit count across strategies (target: > 0.9749)

tracking_method.window_type: prospective only — draws NOT yet in the P167 dataset (draw index > 115000041)
tracking_method.statistical_unit: per distinct target_draw (NOT per bet row)
tracking_method.correction: Bonferroni and BH on pre-declared family (2 signals × N window variants)
tracking_method.success_criterion_for_each_signal: OOS prospective mean > 0.9749 AND p_bh < 0.05 AND consistent direction across ≥ 2 non-overlapping prospective windows of ≥ 50 draws each

pre_registration_rules: Fixed configurations from P167 must not be modified before evaluation
No new thresholds or parameter variants unless separately authorized in a new plan
Evaluation must happen on draws strictly AFTER the last P167 dataset draw (115000041)
Results must compare to random baseline AND best-single-strategy baseline
Must apply multiple-testing correction (BH) to both signals simultaneously
If fewer than 100 prospective draws are available at P170 execution time: report INSUFFICIENT_PROSPECTIVE_DATA and do not claim significance
signal_tracking_plan.data_collection_trigger: New POWER_LOTTO draws are added to the zen-gates canonical DB by the post-draw pipeline. Tracking begins when ≥ 1 draw with index > 115000041 is present in the DB.
forbidden_tracking_practices: Adding tracking draws in retrospect (re-labeling old draws as 'prospective')
Selecting which draws to include after seeing results
Changing the signal configuration after seeing early tracking results

p170_implementation_boundary.scope: P170 is the read-only implementation of P169 plan. It may execute the threshold sensitivity analysis and initiate prospective signal tracking data collection.
allowed: Threshold sensitivity analysis on existing 1499 draws for pre-declared scenarios
Check how many prospective draws (> 115000041) are now available
If ≥ 100 prospective draws available: evaluate Module A and E signals on them
Produce P170 artifact with clear separation of sensitivity vs prospective results
forbidden: Any DB write or new row insertion
Modifying P167 analysis script or re-running with different parameters
Retroactively reclassifying OOS Window 2 (499 draws) as passing 500-draw threshold
success_criteria_for_p170: Sensitivity analysis completed for all 5 pre-declared threshold scenarios
Each scenario clearly labeled RETROSPECTIVE_SENSITIVITY_ONLY or ORIGINAL_PROTOCOL
If prospective draws available: signal tracking evaluation completed
If prospective draws unavailable: status AWAITING_PROSPECTIVE_DATA documented
P167 NULL classification preserved in P170 artifact
DB rows confirmed 94924 before and after
what_p170_cannot_claim: P170 may NOT claim a defensible edge was found unless: (1) prospective Module A or E signal survives BH correction with ≥ 100 prospective draws AND (2) Module F walk-forward OOS protocol from P166 is formally re-run with ≥ 2 windows of ≥ 500 draws each
Sensitivity results are DESCRIPTIVE only — not grounds for deployment

next_task_note: P169 defines the plan. P170 may not begin without explicit user authorization. P170 must be read-only only, must not change P167 verdict, and must not deploy any strategy.
